name: context-engineering-vitepress
description: **Context engineering** can be defined as the practice of designing systems that provide a Large Language Model (LLM) and AI agents with all the necessary information to complete a task effectively. It goes beyond prompt engineering since it focuses on building a comprehensive and structured context from various sources like instructions, external knowledge, memory, tools, and state. The central idea is that the success of a complex LLM-based system depends more on the quality and completeness of the context provided than on the specific wording of the prompt itself.
